all.en: The phone rang while Mr. Chen was eating dinner with his family on Wednesday night.
all.zh: 週三晚上，陳先生正和家人吃晚餐時電話響了。

all.en: A polite voice claimed to be calling from the credit card security department.
all.zh: 一個有禮貌的聲音聲稱來自信用卡安全部門。

all.en: The caller said that someone had tried to make a large purchase overseas.
all.zh: 來電者表示有人試圖在海外進行一筆大額消費。

all.en: Mr. Chen felt his heart beat faster as the man described the supposed fraud.
all.zh: 當那名男子描述所謂的詐欺時，陳先生感到心跳加快。

all.en: The voice on the line asked him to confirm his card number and security code.
all.zh: 電話那頭的聲音要求他確認卡號和安全碼。

all.en: Something about the urgent tone made Mr. Chen feel uncomfortable and suspicious.
all.zh: 那種急迫的語氣讓陳先生覺得不舒服又起疑。

all.en: He told the caller that he would hang up and call the bank directly.
all.zh: 他告訴來電者他要掛掉電話，直接打給銀行。

all.en: The man on the other end suddenly became angry and hung up first.
all.zh: 電話另一頭的男子突然發怒，先掛斷了電話。

all.en: Mr. Chen immediately called the official bank number printed on the back of his card.
all.zh: 陳先生立刻撥打了卡片背面上的銀行官方號碼。

all.en: The real customer service confirmed that no suspicious activity had occurred on his account.
all.zh: 真正的客服人員確認他的帳戶沒有任何可疑活動。

all.en: He warned his elderly parents and friends about the scam the very next day.
all.zh: 隔天他就提醒了年邁的父母和朋友提防這種詐騙。
